name: Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd.
summary: Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of optical preform, fibers and cables, various types of communication cables, and communication devices in the People's Republic of China. It also provides network security equipment and services, big data analysis and operation services, etc. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Tongding Optic-Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd. in January 2015. The company is based in Wujiang, the People's Republic of China.
